message:
feat(macros): session_protocol! proc-macro for typestate generation (bd-3u5d3.2)

Add a `session_protocol!` declarative macro that generates typestate-
encoded session types from a protocol DSL. The macro takes a protocol
specification and produces: message structs, dual session type aliases
(initiator + responder), constructor functions, and loop/renew support
for recursive protocols. This addresses the ergonomics cliff failure
mode — session types fail in practice when annotation burden is too high.

DSL supports: send/recv chaining, select/offer branching, loop/continue
recursion, and message structs with optional fields. The responder type
is automatically derived as the dual (Send↔Recv, Select↔Offer).

20 new tests covering parsing, validation, and code generation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
